danger_signals.visual_form: Player positioning and play-call indicators on field
danger_signals.meaning: Visual layout of defensive/offensive plays indicates threat level and play type
Numeric representation of game state pressure; visual urgency increases as deficit grows

safety_signals.visual_form: Player name and number display on field
safety_signals.meaning: First Madden game to show player names via NFLPA license; clear identification = team strength signal

safety_signals.visual_form: Player proximity to opponent end zone on field display
safety_signals.meaning: Spatial positioning indicates offensive opportunity and safety from turnover zones

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Team logo (officially licensed NFL team logo)
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Opposing team uniform colors and logos
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Team name and logo display in menus and on field; Erik Williams featured on cover as faction representative

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Team logo (officially licensed NFL team logo)
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Opposing team uniform colors and logos
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Team name and logo display in menus and on field; Karl Wilson featured on cover as faction representative

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Official NFL team logos and insignia
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Distinct uniform color schemes differentiate each franchise visually
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Team logos on uniforms, helmets, and in UI; roster player names identify faction membership

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: All 1994 NFL team rosters reflected with accurate player names, numbers, and stats
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player attributes and team capabilities match historical 1994 season data

world_state_to_visual.world_state: Game in progress - offensive vs defensive advantage
world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Field layout shows play formation; passing windows no longer displayed by default (removed from previous versions)
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player movement and play execution reflects called strategy; AI responds to formation type

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Black NFL players rendered as black rather than white (first Madden to do so); visual representation accuracy increased
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player statistics tracked individually throughout season; roster authenticity supports immersion

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Player menu shows any position fillable by roster members
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Allows tactical repositioning without roster constraints; increases strategic depth

environmental_storytelling.example: Cover features John Madden with Dallas Cowboys and San Francisco 49ers players (Erik Williams, Karl Wilson), signaling official NFL partnership and contemporary team prominence
All 1994 NFL rosters with official names and numbers tell story of actual historical season; first game to achieve this comprehensive licensing
Black player representation rendered accurately for first time signals broader cultural shift in game authenticity and representation
NFL on Fox theme song by Scott Schreer (John Madden's broadcasting partnership) grounds game in real broadcast ecology

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Movement follows called play formation; pass windows removed to increase challenge and realism
Formation-based positioning indicates coverage type; AI adapts to offensive threat
Genesis version noted to generate less high-scoring games than SNES version; distinct behavioral tuning by platform
Individual stat tracking throughout season; player performance metrics update based on gameplay

notes: Madden NFL '95 represents a turning point in sports game world-state authenticity. The addition of official NFL and NFLPA licenses enables faction identity to be communicated through actual team names, logos, and player identities rather than generic representations. The historical accuracy of 1994 season rosters makes the game world a documented snapshot of real-world professional football. The removal of passing windows and improved animation system create behavioral authenticity. The visual representation of black players as black (rather than white) is not merely cosmetic but signals the game's commitment to representing the actual world-state of professional football. Danger and safety signals emerge primarily through gameplay state (score, field position) rather than environmental storytelling, as the genre focuses on mechanical simulation rather than narrative danger.
